ākṣepaka (wie eben)

results.rendered_html:
AkzapakaAkzepaka a.
1 Drawing; drawing or snatching off.
2 Censuring, reviling.
— kaḥ
1 A thrower.
2 A detractor, calumniator, accuser.
3 A hunter.
4 (In medic.) Convulsion, spasm.
